text: What if the rain falling on you was more acidic than battery acid? Sulfur and nitrogen oxides, released from factories and cars, mix with water vapor, creating acid rain. This rain can harm plants, fish, and even the structures we build. But there's good news! Regulations have significantly reduced these emissions in many regions. Research shows ecosystems are bouncing back, thanks to these efforts. Want to learn more about how we can protect our planet? Follow for more!
